item.title: PUMA Unisex Smash V2 Zapatillas Puma Schwarz Puma Schwarz 42 EU
item.description: Tienes PUMA Unisex Smash V2 Zapatillas Puma Schwarz Puma Schwarz 42 EU en el siguiente enlace! ℹ️: Inspired by tennis. Enjoyed as daily footwear Durable, grippy, rubber outsole Smash sneakers Updated, improved fit Soft suede/leather upper 🛒 Accede a la oferta!! item.title: PUMA Smash V2 L Zapatillas de Deporte Unisex adulto Puma White Puma Black 43 EU
